## Purpose


## PMO Handoff

- Status: Proposed / In progress / Blocked
- Owner: User / Codex / Code / Cowork / Chat
- Next Owner:
- Next Action:
- Recording Place: GitHub Issue / PR / Drive / Notion / Chat thread

## Scope

- [ ] GitHub / PR / Actions
- [ ] Drive SSOT / Google Docs / `.txt` context
- [ ] Notion / Sheets / Drive operations
- [ ] tool role / PMO rule / handoff rule
- [ ] Gemini / ChatGPT external review
- [ ] other:

## External Review

- Needed: No / Yes
- Trigger:
- Reviewer: N/A / Gemini / ChatGPT
- Result: N/A / Blocker / Risk / Suggestion / No issue

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] PMO handoff format is clear
- [ ] SSOT / GitHub / Drive / Notion impact is handled or marked N/A
- [ ] External review is completed or explicitly not needed
- [ ] Next owner is clear
- [ ] Sync evidence is linked or marked N/A
